name: Endless 18 Golf
address: 2495 Brunswick Pike, Trenton Fwy BUS, Lawrence Township, NJ 08648
about: Endless 18 Golf is a 4,500-square-foot indoor golf simulator facility that offers an immersive experience, allowing players to practice and play on any course in the world year-round. The venue features state-of-the-art simulators designed to replicate the feel of a real golf course, providing a realistic environment for golfers of all skill levels. It also provides personalized coaching sessions, a family-friendly atmosphere, and is conveniently located with ample parking.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators that replicate the feel of world-famous golf courses
Year-round, all-weather play regardless of conditions outside
Certified golf instructors offering customized coaching programs
Family-friendly environment perfect for outings and events

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services provided.
No information on alcohol services provided. BYOB policy not mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to confirm.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy or any food services on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue describes itself as having a 'welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all ages' and being 'perfect for family outings'.
